events.title: 607th European Economic and Social Committee Plenary session

items.title: 607th European Economic and Social Committee Plenary session
items.summary: High-level debate on EU enlargement Opening remarks by Séamus BOLAND, President of the European Economic and Social Committee (EESC) Keynote speech by Marta KOS, European Commissioner for Enlargement Debate with EESC Members

items.title: 607th European Economic and Social Committee Plenary session
items.summary: High-level debate on EU enlargement Session I - Building a safer, more resilient and secure Europe with Mihai POPSOI, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Moldova, Nerijus ALEKSIEJŪNAS, Ambassador, Permanent Representative of the Republic of Lithuania to the EU, and Ariane RODERT, Rapporteur of the European economic and Social Committees Opinion on the European Preparedness Union Strategy Video message by David McALLISTER, Member of the European Parliament, Chair of the AFET Committee Participants from the enlargement candidate members initiative Moderator: Teona LAVRELASHVILI, Research Associate, Wilfried Martens Centre for European Studies

items.title: 607th European Economic and Social Committee Plenary session
items.summary: High-level debate on EU enlargement Session II - Accelerating socio-economic convergence with the EU to drive European growth and competitiveness with Zulfi ISMAILI, Ambassador of the Republic of North Macedonia to the European Union, Oleg ROIBU, EESC Member, rapporteur of the opinion REX/612 "Civil society's role in supporting reform under the Growth Plans for the Western Balkans and Moldova, as well as in Ukraine's reform path", and Andrej ZORKO, EESC Member, co-rapporteur of the opinion REX/612 Participants from the enlargement candidate members initiative Moderator: Igor Šoltes, Head of the Regional Cooperation Council (RCC) Office in Brussels

items.title: 607th European Economic and Social Committee Plenary session
items.summary: High-level debate on EU enlargement Concluding remarks by Valentina SUPERTI, Director for Western Balkans, European Commission’s Directorate-General for Enlargement and Eastern Neighbourhood (DG ENEST), and Séamus BOLAND, President of the European Economic and Social Committee (EESC)

events.title: EC archives of the week

items.title: EC archives of the week (05-11/07): Meeting between Muhammad Yunus, 2006 Nobel Peace Prize ® laureate, and José Manuel Barroso, President of the EC (06/07/2011, 15 years ago) Debate and vote on the draft revision of the Treaties of the EC, plenary session of the EP (07-08/07/1981, 45 years ago) EU-US leaders meeting and NATO Summit in Warsaw (08-09/07/2016, 10 years ago) Ministers for Finance gave Slovenia the final go-ahead to become the 13th Member of the Eurozone on 1 January 2007 (11/07/2006, 20 years ago) International Day of Reflection and Commemoration of the 1995 Genocide in Srebrenica (11/07)
